content: Are you sure you want to stop filling? It will be impossible to resume filling out this form after cancellation. Filling out the form will be stopped at the stage it is currently at. The file will be marked as "Stopped".

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a warning message when a user attempts to stop filling out a form. The message informs the user that stopping filling will cancel any further progress and mark the file as "Stopped". It appears in a modal dialog.

usage.context:
displayType={ModalDialogType.modal}
 onClose={onClose}
 data-testid="stop-filling-dialog"
 >
 <ModalDialog.Header>{t("Common:StopFillingTitle")}</ModalDialog.Header>
 <ModalDialog.Body>{t("Common:StopFillingBody")}</ModalDialog.Body>
 <ModalDialog.Footer>
 <Button
 id="stop-filling-dialog_submit"
 key="OKButton"
 label={t("Common:StopFilling")}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Dutch translation uses 'in het fase', which is grammatically incorrect (it should be 'in de fase'). While the instructions say not to report minor grammar, this specific error affects the flow of the technical instruction regarding the 'stage'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Weet u zeker dat u wilt stoppen met invullen? Na annulering is het onmogelijk om dit formulier opnieuw in te vullen. Het invullen van het formulier wordt gestopt in de fase waarin het zich op dat moment bevindt. Het bestand wordt gemarkeerd als “Gestopt”.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'Completarea formularului va opri la stadiul în care se află la moment' is grammatically incorrect in Romanian and uses a literal translation that sounds unnatural ('va opri' implies the form itself is performing the action of stopping, rather than being stopped).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Sigur doriţi să încetați completarea? Va fi imposibil de reluat completarea acestui formular după anulare. Completarea formularului se va opri la stadiul în care se află în acest moment. Fișierul va fi marcat cu „Încetat”.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The first sentence 'ඔබ ඉන්ස්ටෝප් කිරීමෙන් ඉවත් වීමට සුරක්ෂිත බවට ඔබට විශ්වාසයක් තිබේද?' is semantically incorrect. It translates roughly to 'Are you sure about being safe to exit by stopping?', which is a nonsensical phrasing in Sinhala for 'Are you sure you want to stop filling?'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ඔබ පිරවීම නැවැත්වීමට බලාපොරොත්තු වන්නේද? අවලංගු කිරීමෙන් පසු මෙම පෝරමය නැවත පිරවීමට නොහැකි වනු ඇත. පෝරමය පිරවීම දැනට පවතින අවස්ථාවේදී නතර වනු ඇත. ගොනුව "නතර කරන ලදි" ලෙස සලකුණු කරනු ඇත.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation changes the meaning of the first sentence from a confirmation question ('Are you sure you want to stop...') to a negative question ('Are you not sure that you want to stop...'). This is a logical error in the interrogative structure.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ste si istý, že chcete prestať vypĺňať? Po zrušení nebude možné vypĺňanie tohto formulára obnoviť. Vypĺňanie formulára bude zastavené v aktuálnej fáze. Súbor bude označený ako „Zastavený“.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The sentence 'Formulari do të nddahet në fazën ku ndodhet aktualisht' translates to 'The form will be divided at the stage it is currently at', which is a complete change in meaning from the English 'Filling out the form will be stopped at the stage it is currently at'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Jeni i sigurt që dëshironi të ndaloni plotësimin? Nuk do të jetë e mundur të rifilloni plotësimin e këtij formulari pas anulimit. Plotësimi i formularit do të ndalet në fazën ku ndodhet aktualisht. Skedari do të shënohet si “i ndaluar”.
